name: Sarah Chen
bio: Sarah is a cybersecurity professional with over 8 years of experience in network security and privacy. She holds a CISSP certification and has written extensively about VPN technology, remote work security, and digital privacy.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: Marcus specializes in VPN testing and comparison. A former network engineer, he brings hands-on technical expertise to every review, testing speed, security features, and real-world reliability across dozens of countries.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: Elena covers the intersection of travel and cybersecurity. As a digital nomad who has worked from 40+ countries, she brings first-hand experience to guides on public Wi-Fi safety, travel VPN usage, and international data protection.
